# BF Navigator GitHub Instructions

Primary workflow instructions live in `.github/github-instruction/README.md`.

Agent role prompts live in `.github/github-instruction/agents/`.

Copilot instructions live in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.

Always read and follow `CONVENTION.md` before planning or implementation.

**Accessibility is the primary design and implementation constraint — see `CONVENTION.md` section 9 and `AGENTS.md`.**
